problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Nanoparticle. Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
